payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Partial/edge-cropped view of an illuminated cream/off-white fabric lampshade with visible vertical seams and a scalloped lower edge, mounted on a turned dark wood (or dark-finished) base; small decorative pull or finial hangs beneath the shade; lamp appears warm-lit and is photographed at close range (approximately 0.8 m from camera).
attributes: small hanging finial or pull visible
